name: allure-deployer-action
description: Deploy Allure test reports to GitHub Pages with history and report aggregation

scripts.build: rm -rf ./dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json && ncc build dist/index.js -o dist/main -e allure && ncc build dist/utilities/cleanup.js -o dist/cleanup && node -e "const f='dist/main/package.json';const p=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(f));p.overrides={'d3-time':'3'};require('fs').writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(p))" && cd dist/main && npm install allure@^3.3.1 --omit=dev --silent
